View this page

PimPam API Documentation¶

PimPam is an open-source, ad-free, human-first social network. No algorithms. No ads. No owners. Licensed under AGPL-3.0.

The backend is a FastAPI application exposing a versioned REST API (/api/v1/) and a set of ActivityPub federation endpoints at the root level.

API Reference

  • Authentication
    • Register
    • Login
    • Refresh
  • Users & Profiles
    • Get own profile
    • Update own profile
    • Get public profile
    • Follow a user
    • Unfollow a user
  • Feed
    • Get chronological feed
  • Posts
    • Create a post
    • Get a post
    • Edit a post
    • Delete a post
    • Vote on a post
    • Retract a vote
  • Comments & Reactions
    • Comment object
    • Create a comment
    • List comments
    • List replies
    • Delete a comment
    • Add a reaction
    • Remove a reaction
  • Communities
    • List communities
    • Create a community
    • Get a community
    • List community posts
    • Join a community
    • Leave a community
    • Moderation
  • Moderation
    • Remove a post
    • Restore a post
    • Propose a ban
    • Vote on a ban proposal
    • List active bans
    • Propose a moderator promotion
    • Vote on a mod promotion proposal
  • Direct Messages
    • Send a message
    • Inbox
    • Get conversation
    • Mark as read
  • Notifications
    • Notification object
    • Inbox
    • Unread count
    • Mark one as read
    • Mark all as read
    • List preference overrides
    • Update a preference
    • Real-time delivery
  • Friend Groups
    • Friend group object
    • List groups
    • Create a group
    • Get Close Friends group
    • Group detail
    • Rename a group
    • Delete a group
    • Add a member
    • Remove a member
    • Post visibility
  • Search
    • Search
  • Media Uploads
    • Upload an image
  • WebSocket
    • Events pushed to the client
    • Events sent from the client
  • Federation (ActivityPub)
    • Discovery
    • Actor
    • Inbox
    • Outbox
    • Followers / Following
    • HTTP Signatures

Project

  • Missing & Planned Features
  • Design Principles

Quick links¶

  • Interactive docs (Swagger UI): http://localhost:8000/docs

  • ReDoc: http://localhost:8000/redoc

  • Health check: GET /health

  • Source code: https://github.com/feliuserra/pimpam
